jq -r 'select(.record_id|IN(...selected entity ids...)) | {record_id, record_aliases, display_name, payload, source_ids, evidence_refs: [.evidence_refs[]?.evidence_id]}' data/canonical/entities.jsonl | jq '.'

rg -n 'Restani|Stillwell|PHQ Enterprises|National September 11|Triumph Construction|Trillium CNG|NEPC|Milliman|Gotham Organization|P&A Administrative|Gail Lloyd' raw/sources/meeting_doc_*/blocks.jsonl | head -120
